files.name: alert.component.ts
alert.variants.ts

docs.overview:
# Alert

Displays a callout for user attention.
docs.api:
# API Reference

[z-alert] Component

| Property         | Description       | Type                          | Default   |
| ---------------- | ----------------- | ----------------------------- | --------- |
| `[zTitle]`       | Alert title       | `string \| TemplateRef<void>` | `-`       |
| `[zDescription]` | Alert description | `string \| TemplateRef<void>` | `-`       |
| `[zIcon]`        | Alert icon        | `TemplateRef<void> \| string` | `-`       |
| `[zType]`        | Alert variant     | `default \| destructive`      | `default` |

**zIcon:** if not specified, default icon will be `lucideCircleAlert`

demos.name: basic.ts
demos.content:
import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component } from '@angular/core'; import { NgIcon, provideIcons } from '@ng-icons/core'; import { lucideCircleCheck, lucidePopcorn } from '@ng-icons/lucide'; import { ZardAlertComponent } from '../alert.component'; @Component({ selector: 'z-demo-alert-basic', imports: [ZardAlertComponent, NgIcon], template: `

Please verify your billing information and try again.

  • Check your card details
  • Ensure sufficient funds
  • Verify billing address
`, changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, viewProviders: [provideIcons({ lucideCircleCheck, lucidePopcorn })], }) export class ZardDemoAlertBasicComponent {}
